title: chondrilla altissima
intro: Chondrilla altissima, also known as Devil's thistle or cartilaginous thistle, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and anti-cancer effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Chondrilla altissima include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and prevent cancer cell growth. Chondrilla altissima can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
